prompt: Use the satellite imagery colors for this road map
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the road map, to apply the color palette of image 2, the satellite image. Transform the existing light blue water features in image 1 to the deep blue of the ocean found in image 2. Change the dark grey and blue land areas and city blocks in image 1 to the earthy brown and tan hues of the landmass in image 2. Finally, recolor the bright road lines in image 1 to a prominent but naturalistic light tone, such as off-white or light grey, consistent with bright features seen in satellite imagery, ensuring they remain clearly visible.
